title: UseRestriction
description: Rules or legal limits on how a resource may be used

restrictionNote.title: restriction note
restrictionNote.description: Significant information pertaining to the use or reproduction of the data
examples: This data may be used for any purpose without restriction.
This data may be used for research purposes. Commercial use requires written permission from the data steward.

restrictionStatus.title: restriction status
restrictionStatus.description: Indication of whether or not there are use restrictions on the archival materials, consider using a controlled vocabulary such as https://www.archives.gov/research/catalog/lcdrg/authority-lists/use-restriction-status

specificRestriction.title: specific restriction
specificRestriction.description: Authority, code list entry, or policy reference that defines the specific use restriction; consider using a controlled vocabulary such as the NARA https://www.archives.gov/research/catalog/lcdrg/authority-lists/specific-use-restriction

anyOf.description: inline description of the specific restriction

_oldDocs.rationale: The introduction of dcat-us:UseRestriction in DCAT-US 3.0, aligned with NARA (National Archives and Records Administration) guidelines, enhances compliance and interoperability with NARA-specific use restriction standards. This enables organizations to accurately convey NARA-specific restrictions on data resources, ensuring adherence to archival and data preservation requirements, and promoting consistent data management practices within the DCAT-US framework.

examples.restrictionNote: This data may be used for any purpose without restriction.
